description_long: This is a compact, double-barreled handgun with a robust, metallic frame and a short, thick barrel assembly. The metal surface appears weathered and slightly tarnished, suggesting frequent use or age, with a matte, grayish finish. The grip is made of a reddish-brown wood with a visible grain pattern and a small oval inlay, providing a striking contrast to the metal body. The trigger and hammer are integrated into the frame, with the hammer protruding slightly above the rear. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal embellishments and a focus on durability and function. The object lacks visible slide markings or external magazine features, emphasizing its simple, classic construction.
description: A compact, double-barreled handgun with a weathered metal frame and a reddish-brown wooden grip. The design is utilitarian and robust, with minimal decorative features.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the handgun, highlighting the double barrels, wooden grip with inlay, and exposed hammer.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the twin barrel openings and the width of the frame, with minimal detail visible on the grip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the first, showing the barrels, grip, and hammer from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the grip and the alignment of the barrels, with the hammer and frame visible.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is angular with a pronounced, faceted contour and is crafted from reddish-brown wood featuring a visible grain pattern. It has a smooth surface with a glossy finish and an oval-shaped gold or brass inlay near the center, adding a touch of embellishment. The grip appears to be ergonomically shaped for a secure hold, though it lacks finger grooves or aggressive texturing.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: This handgun lacks a traditional trigger guard, exposing the trigger area directly. The absence of a guard gives the frame a more open and minimalistic appearance, with no visible reinforcement, undercuts, or texturing around the trigger area.
attribute_barrel_type: The handgun features a short, double-barrel configuration with a thick, cylindrical profile. The barrels are side-by-side, unthreaded, and have a matte, weathered finish with no visible compensators, ports, or external markings. The exterior is plain, emphasizing function over decoration.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide or barrel exterior. The surfaces are plain and unadorned, with no manufacturer logos, model names, or decorative patterns apparent.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: There is no visible magazine base or floorplate, as the handgun appears to be a break-action or derringer-style design without a detachable magazine. The grip terminates in a flat, angular base with no extensions, flares, or finger rests.
